c105997e-c73b-4573-9d55-249eefef31e0.description:
A tool for full player team management: create, rename, and delete. Supports custom names and HEX colors. 

Warning: Features are restricted to the Host only. The block directly modifies world data — use at your own risk.
c105997e-c73b-4573-9d55-249eefef31e0.title: Teams Gate
